title: Proclamation No. 1421, s. 2007
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 1421

CREATING AND DESIGNATING A BUILDING KNOWN AS SM CITY PAMPANGA ESTABLISHED ON PARCELS OF LAND LOCATED AT THE CITY OF SAN FERNANDO AND THE MUNICIPALITY OF MEXICO, PAMPANGA AS AN INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CENTER PURSUANT TO REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7916 AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8748

Pursuant to the powers vested in me under Republic Act No. 7916, otherwise known as the Special Economic Zone Act of 1995 as amended by Republic Act No. 8748 and upon recommendation of the Board of Directors of the Philippine Economic Zone Authority, I, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, President of the Philippines, do hereby created and designate as Information Technology Center, subject to the provisions of Republic Act No. 7916 as amended, its Implementing Rules and Regulations, Resolution No. 00-411 dated 29 December 2000 and Resolution No. 07-058 dated 13 February 2007 of the Directors of the Philippines Economic Zone Authority, the SM City Pampanga, which stands on parcels of land located at the City of San Fernando and the Municipality of Mexico, Pampanga, containing an aggregate area of TWO HUNDRED EIGHTY SIX THOUSAND SIX HUNDRED EIGHT (286,608) SQUARE METERS, more or less, as defined by the following technical description:

вҖңTCT No. 370773-R

A parcel of land (lot 1 of the cons. & subdivision plan Pcs-035416-005647, being a portion of lot 1 to 6, Bsd-03-002642 (OLT), L.R.C. Rec. No.), situated in the Bo. of San Jose, Mun. of San Fdo., Prov. of Pampanga. Bounded on the SW., along lines 1-2-3 by Lot 7, Bsd-03-002642 (OLT), along lines 3 to 33 by lot 3208-E, (LRC) Psd-209005; along lines 33-34-35 by lot 3623; on the NW., & NE., along lines 35 to 42 by lot 3631; on the NE., along lines 42 to 48 by lot 3632, all of Cad. 71, San Fdo. Cad.; along lines 48 to 55-1 by Lot 2, (Existing Road) of the cons. & subd. plan. Beginning at a point marked вҖҳ1вҖҷ on plan, being N. 52 deg. 01вҖҷW., 957.60 m. from M.B.M. 20, Cad. 71, San Fdo. Cad.;
